brand-story-img-a7b2c1.query: Where Craftsmanship Meets Everyday Elegance Born from a belief that fine jewelry shouldn't live in a box, Velmora creates pieces meant to be worn every day. Each design is hand-finished with 18K gold plating over hypoallergenic base metals — delivering the look and feel of luxury without the luxury price tag.
brand-story-img-a7b2c1.ownerQuery: Where Craftsmanship Meets Everyday Elegance Born from a belief that fine jewelry shouldn't live in a box, Velmora creates pieces meant to be worn every day. Each design is hand-finished with 18K gold plating over hypoallergenic base metals — delivering the look and feel of luxury without the luxury price tag.
